query:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS esrs_datapoints;

CREATE TABLE esrs_datapoints (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  datapointId VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  esrsStandard VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  disclosureRequirement VARCHAR(50),
  paragraph INT,
  relatedAR VARCHAR(50),
  datapointName TEXT NOT NULL,
  dataType VARCHAR(50),
  conditionalOrAlternative BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  mayVoluntary BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  appendixB_SFDR BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  appendixC_LessThan750 BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  appendixC_AllUndertakings BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX esrsStandard_idx (esrsStandard),
  INDEX disclosureRequirement_idx (disclosureRequirement)
);

CREATE TABLE esrs_datapoints (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  datapointId VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  esrsStandard VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  disclosureRequirement VARCHAR(50),
  paragraph INT,
  relatedAR VARCHAR(50),
  datapointName TEXT NOT NULL,
  dataType VARCHAR(50),
  conditionalOrAlternative BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  mayVoluntary BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  appendixB_SFDR BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  appendixC_LessThan750 BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  appendixC_AllUndertakings BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX esrsStandard_idx (esrsStandard),
  INDEX disclosureRequirement_idx (disclosureRequirement)
);
